description_long: This is a modern floor lamp featuring a cylindrical, light-colored lampshade mounted atop three slender, evenly spaced tripod legs. The lampshade appears to be made of fabric or a matte material, providing a soft diffusion of light. The tripod legs are thin, likely constructed from metal, and converge at the base, giving the lamp a stable yet airy appearance. The design is minimalist, with no visible switches or decorative embellishments, emphasizing clean lines and functional elegance. The lamp is suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces such as lounges, waiting areas, or residential living rooms. Its neutral color palette and simple geometry allow it to blend seamlessly into a variety of environments.
description: A minimalist floor lamp with a cylindrical fabric shade and three slender metal tripod legs, designed for modern urban interiors. The lamp features clean lines and a neutral color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical shade and all three tripod legs symmetrically spaced.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the depth of the shade and the staggered arrangement of the tripod legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the tripod legs visible and the shade centered.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the profile of the shade and the alignment of two legs, with the third leg partially obscured.
